user.title: HA Context Exporter
user.description:
Create sanitized Home Assistant context exports for support or analysis.

Profiles:
- compact: core YAML files, templates, packages and essential registries
- standard: compact + dashboards and blueprints
- extended: standard + custom_components

abort.already_configured: Only one HA Context Exporter entry is supported.

init.title: Export options
init.description:
Choose what the generated archive should contain and how aggressive the masking should be.

Profiles:
- compact: smaller export focused on core config and registries
- standard: recommended default for most troubleshooting cases
- extended: includes custom_components for deeper analysis

export_context.name: Export Home Assistant context
export_context.description: Create a sanitized ZIP export of the current Home Assistant configuration.
